settings.title: Settings
settings.username_help: Used for Private Chat invites. No spaces. Allowed: letters, numbers, dot, underscore.
settings.username_invalid_desc: Use 3 to 20 characters. Only letters, numbers, dot, underscore. No spaces.
settings.username_taken: That username is already taken. Try a different one.
settings.stored_on_device: Stored on this device. (You can later persist to the database when ready.)
settings.local_toggles_note: These toggles are local for now.
settings.adhan_note: You can turn this on or off anytime.
settings.adhan_location_subtitle: Use device location or enter coordinates manually.
settings.invalid_location_desc: Please enter a valid latitude and longitude.
settings.device_location_not_saved: Device location is not saved yet
settings.location_unavailable_desc: Geolocation is not supported on this device/browser.
settings.permission_needed_desc: Please allow location access to use device location.
settings.deletion_intro: You can request deletion of your account and associated data.
settings.deletion_note: We process deletion requests within 30 days. If you cannot access the app, you can request deletion using the link below.
settings.deletion_email_line1: I would like to delete my account and associated data.
settings.no_blocked_users: You have not blocked anyone yet.

home.privacy: Your privacy and data are protected. We never share your information.

quran.getStartedSubtitle: Select a reciter and a surah below to begin listening to the Noble Quran.

howToListenSteps.2: Choose a surah from the list or tap a popular surah card
howToListenSteps.3: Wait for the audio to load, then press Play
